textbook: 人教版 PEP 英语四年级下册

unit_test.title: Unit 1 My school 单元基础过关测验

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: 'teachers' office' 的中文意思是'教师办公室'。
questions.explanation: teachers' office是固定词组，表示教师办公室。

questions.knowledge_point: 字母组合er在词尾的发音规则
questions.question: 在单词 water, tiger, computer 中，结尾的 er 发音相同。
questions.explanation: 在PEP四年级英语中，结尾的er通常发/ə/音。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: 如果要表达'在二楼'，英文应该是 'on the two floor'。
questions.explanation: 层数应该使用序数词，'在二楼'应表达为 'on the second floor'。

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: Library 是我们可以借阅图书的地方。
questions.explanation: library意为图书馆。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认场所的一般疑问句
questions.question: Do you have a library? 的否定回答是 'No, I don't.'
questions.explanation: Do you疑问句的否定回答使用don't。

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: Where do you play football? In the ________.
questions.explanation: playground是操场，踢足球通常在操场进行。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: The computer room is ________ the second floor.
questions.explanation: 在第几层楼固定搭配介词on。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: Is ________ the computer room?
questions.explanation: Is是系动词单数形式，主语也需用单数指示代词this。

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: My school has many beautiful flowers in the ________.
questions.explanation: 花园（garden）里通常有花。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: Where's the art room? It's ________ to the gym.
questions.explanation: next to为固定搭配，意为紧邻、在...隔壁。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认场所的一般疑问句
questions.question: Is this the music room? Yes, ________.
questions.explanation: Is this疑问句的肯定回答用Yes, it is。

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: Go to the ________. Read a book.
questions.explanation: 在图书馆（library）看书。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认场所的一般疑问句
questions.question: Do you have a music room? ________. We have one.
questions.explanation: 根据后一句'We have one'可知回答应是肯定的。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: That's my classroom. It's on the ________ floor.
questions.explanation: 描述楼层必须使用序数词，first是第一。

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: How many ________ are there in your school?
questions.explanation: How many后面接可数名词复数形式。

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: Go to the ________. Hand in the homework. (提示：去老师办公室交作业)
questions.explanation: teachers' office可以简称office，此处填office符合题意。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: Where is the library? It is ________ the second floor.
questions.explanation: 表达在某一层楼用介词on。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: The gym is next ________ the library.
questions.explanation: next to是表示方位的固定搭配短语。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认场所的一般疑问句
questions.question: Is that the art room? No, it ________.
questions.explanation: 一般疑问句Is that...的否定回答是No, it isn't。

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: 请将下列英文单词与对应的中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: playground-操场, garden-花园, library-图书馆, gym-体育馆。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: 请将英文表达与对应的中文翻译连线。
questions.explanation: first floor-一楼, next to-紧邻, art room-美术教室, second floor-二楼。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: 连词成句：the, Where, is, library
questions.explanation: 询问地点的句型是Where + is + the + 地点名词。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: 连词成句：It, the, is, on, first, floor
questions.explanation: 描述方位的陈述句结构：主语 + is + 介词短语。

exam.title: 四年级英语下册第一单元综合能力评价

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: 'art room' 是美术教室的意思。
questions.explanation: art是美术，room是房间，合起来是美术教室。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: 如果要表示一楼，可以说 'one floor'。
questions.explanation: 应该用序数词 first floor。

questions.knowledge_point: 字母组合er在词尾的发音规则
questions.question: 单词 dinner 结尾处的 er 发音与 water 结尾相同。
questions.explanation: 两者都符合词尾er发弱读/ə/的规律。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认场所的一般疑问句
questions.question: Is this a teacher's desk? 它的回答可以是 Yes, it is.
questions.explanation: 一般疑问句Is this的常用肯定回答。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: 句子 'The gym is next to the library.' 的意思是体育馆在图书馆后边。
questions.explanation: next to 的意思是'在...隔壁'或'紧邻'，不是'在...后边'。

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: We have a new ________. We can draw pictures there.
questions.explanation: 美术教室是画画的地方。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: Where is the ________ office?
questions.explanation: 教师办公室是指多位老师共用的，复数名词所有格在s后面加逗号。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: —Is this the library? —No, it isn't. The library is ________ the second floor.
questions.explanation: 表示在楼层上，介词用on。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认场所的一般疑问句
questions.question: —________ you have a music room? —Yes, we do.
questions.explanation: have是实义动词，主语you，疑问句需借助助动词do。

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: Go to the ________. Play football.
questions.explanation: 在操场踢足球。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认场所的一般疑问句
questions.question: That ________ the computer room.
questions.explanation: 主语that是单数，系动词用is。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认场所的一般疑问句
questions.question: —Is that the teachers' office? —________. It's the library.
questions.explanation: 后文说它是图书馆，说明前面的回答是否定的。

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: I like books. Let's go to the ________.
questions.explanation: 喜欢书的人通常去图书馆。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: The computer room is ________ to the music room.
questions.explanation: next to 是固定词组。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: —Where is your classroom? —It's on the ________ floor.
questions.explanation: 题目中已有the，所以只需填入序数词second。

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: There are many computers in the computer ________.
questions.explanation: computer room是微机室/电脑室。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: Your classroom is on the ________(第一) floor.
questions.explanation: first是第一的意思。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认场所的一般疑问句
questions.question: ________ you have a library? Yes, we do.
questions.explanation: 主语为you，一般疑问句开头用do。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问与描述场所方位
questions.question: The music room is next ________ the art room.
questions.explanation: next to是固定搭配。

questions.knowledge_point: 学校场所词汇认读与拼写
questions.question: Match the English words with their Chinese meanings.
questions.explanation: water-水, teacher-老师, sister-姐妹, dinner-晚餐。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认场所的一般疑问句
questions.question: 将下列短语翻译进行配对。
questions.explanation: this way-这边走, excuse me-打扰了, how many-多少, welcome to-欢迎来到。

questions.knowledge_point: 确认场所的一般疑问句
questions.question: 连词成句：Is, this, teachers', the, office
questions.explanation: 一般疑问句：Is + this + the + 名称？

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 核心校园地点名词及其功能联系
knowledge_summary.key_formula: library(书), playground(运动), teachers' office(老师), art room(画画), computer room(电脑), garden(花)
common_mistakes: 将 teachers' office 拼写成 teacher office 或 teacher's office (指全体老师办公室时需用复数所有格)
knowledge_summary.tips: 可以通过功能联想法记忆，如：Read in the library; Draw in the art room.

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 介词on与序数词在楼层中的应用
knowledge_summary.key_formula: It's on the + 序数词 (first/second) + floor.
common_mistakes: 使用基数词表达楼层，如说 on the one floor
漏掉定冠词 the，如说 on first floor
knowledge_summary.tips: 记住 '一首二序'：一楼用first，二楼用second，且前面一定要加the。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 确认场所的两种问句：Is this... 和 Do you have...
knowledge_summary.key_formula: Is this/that...? -> Yes, it is. / No, it isn't.; Do you have...? -> Yes, we do. / No, we don't.
common_mistakes: Is this的回答误用 Yes, this is
Do you have的回答误用 Yes, I have
knowledge_summary.tips: 问句用什么词开头（Is/Do），回答通常就用什么词结尾（is/do）。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 字母组合er在单词末尾的弱读发音
knowledge_summary.key_formula: er 在词尾通常读作短促而轻弱的 /ə/
common_mistakes: 发音过重或发成 /r/ 的卷舌音
knowledge_summary.tips: 顺口溜：Sister, brother, water, tiger, 结尾 er 读音轻。
